cb_step_9.title: Enable slice intersection interaction
cb_step_9.instruction: Turn on visibility, set Translate and Rotate.

cb_step_10.title: Adjust slice intersection
cb_step_10.instruction: Translate and rotate cross lines in each view.

cb_step_12.title: Show curve in View 1 and Red

cb_step_13.title: Draw mandibular curve
cb_step_13.instruction: Click points along mandible, then Done.

cb_step_20.title: Draw fibula line
cb_step_20.instruction: Place points distally to proximally, then Done.

cb_step_29.title: Adjust cut planes
cb_step_29.instruction: Drag handles to position, then Done.

operation_descriptions: Change layout to Conventional
Toggle slice visibility in 3D for Red view
Toggle FOV Spacing match 2D for Red view
Enable slice intersection visibility and interaction modes
Configure mandibular curve display in View 1 and Red
Switch to BoneReconstructionPlanner layout
Turn off slice visibility in 3D for Red view
Create bone models from segmentations
Change layout to Conventional
Toggle slice visibility in 3D for Red view
Toggle FOV Spacing match 2D for Red view
Enable slice intersection visibility and interaction modes
Manually adjust the slice intersection position by translate and rotate of the cross lines in each view.
Add mandibular curve
Configure mandibular curve display in View 1 and Red
Manually click and draw on the "Red" view to create a curve along the mandible.
Manually click and draw on the "Red" view to create a curve along the mandible.
Switch to BoneReconstructionPlanner layout
Turn off slice visibility in 3D for Red view
Add one cut plane

Place one mandibular cut plane using the extension's Add cut plane workflow. If the user requested N cut planes, repeat the Add cut plane + place plane interaction N times. Do not store these planes as a rotation plane; they are mandibular cut planes managed by the extension.

Place one mandibular cut plane using the extension's Add cut plane workflow. If the user requested N cut planes, repeat the Add cut plane + place plane interaction N times. Do not store these planes as a rotation plane; they are mandibular cut planes managed by the extension.
Add fibula line
Draw a line over the fibula in "3D View 2", starting with the first point distally and the last point proximally.
Draw a line over the fibula in "3D View 2", starting with the first point distally and the last point proximally.
Center fibula line using fibula model
Enable automatic mandibular planes positioning
Enable make all mandible planes rotate together
Generate reconstruction (update fibula planes, bone pieces, transform)
Show mandibular cut planes
Show mandibular planes interaction handles
Manually adjust the mandibular cut planes in the mandible 3D view by dragging the visible plane interaction handles until the positions and rotations look correct.
Regenerate reconstruction
Hide mandibular cut planes
Hide original mandible model

ground_api_evidence_note: ground_api_evidence is pre-revision retrieval evidence; final_api_evidence reflects the current validated templates.
